title: PolicyChanged
description: Event published when policy financial details (premium, deductible) are updated.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

premium.description: Updated annual premium in CHF as a plain decimal string (e.g. '1234.50').

deductible.description: Updated deductible in CHF as a plain decimal string (e.g. '500.00').

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the event was created.
